name: ccrouter-terminal-bridge
description: Enables CCRouter to send messages to Claude Code terminal sessions

ccrouter.enterPauseMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after pasting a message before sending Enter. Increase if messages get stuck in terminals. Set to 0 to send Enter immediately.

ccrouter.bridgeHost.description: Host to bind the bridge HTTP server to. Use 0.0.0.0 for network access (required for cross-machine setups).

ccrouter.daemonUrl.description: URL of the CCRouter daemon for cross-machine setups (e.g. http://192.168.0.177:19919). Leave empty for local-only.
